titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 5975

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=756 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 20:57:31.697944+00 | translation moa=757 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 20:57:31.728212+00

p.cl: Patricius Dreng de Reiningtona . Omnibus Hanc cartam uisuris uel audituris  salutem .

Sciatis me de consensu heredis mei uendidisse et quietam omnino clamasse de me et he
redibus meis et presenti carta mea confirmasse Iohanni de Hunsinghowre medietatem tocius
terre mee In Reningtona per totum sine aliquo retinemento pro duodecim Marcis argenti quas
assingnare uoluerit In feodum et hereditate de Priore et Conuentu de Coldingham . Fa
ciendo eis seruitium quod pertinet ad medietatem terre mee . Quare uolo quod predictus Iohannes et
heredes sui uel eius assignati predictam terram habeant et Iure hereditario teneant de
predicto Priore et Conuentu cum omnibus Libertatibus et aisiamentis ad illam terram pertinentibus .
Ita libere et quiete sicut ego eam tenui . faciendo eis predictam seruicium sicut prenominatum est .

Hiis testi
bus Walter de Lindes’ vicecomite . Patricio filio Ade . Henrico de Prendergest . Willelmo de Wideslate . Willelmo de Lumesden’ . [transposed] Iohanne de Lu
mesdene . Ada de Ristonta Reginaldo de Ristona Helia de Prendergest . Ada
filio suo . Morice de Æitona . Thoma de Aldecambus . dauid . de Quicheswde . et Multis aliis .
Patrick Dreng of Renton, to all who shall view or hear this charter, sends greeting.

Know me, with the consent of my heirs, to have sold and entirely quitclaimed for myself and my heirs, and by this my present charter to have made firm, to John of Hunsingore half of my whole land in Renton, without any withholding throughout the whole, in return for twelve merks of silver which he willed to assign in feu and heritage of the prior and convent of Coldingham, performing for them the service which pertains to half of my land. Wherefore I will that the said John and his heirs or his assigns shall have the said land and hold by hereditary right of the aforesaid prior and convent with all liberties and easements pertaining to that land, so freely and quitely as I held it, performing for them the aforesaid service just as it has been enumerated before.

With these witnesses: Walter of Lindsay the sheriff, Patrick son of Adam, Henry of Prenderguest, William of Wideslade, William of Lumsdaine, John of Lumsdaine, Adam of Reston, Reginald of Reston, Elias of Prenderguest, Adam his son, Maurice of Ayton, Thomas of Oldcambus, David of Quixwood, and many others.
